_verification: Verify multipliers against CEC Rules 28-200 and 26-250/26-254 and standard ratings against Rule 14-104 before field use.

classes.application: Compact, rejection-style. Preferred for UL 508A panels, feeders, branch circuits, motor circuits. High current limitation.
Small motors, control transformers, control circuits. Rejection ferrule. Very compact.
High current limitation. Retrofit of Class H clips. Motor and feeder protection where let-through must be low.
General purpose, motor circuits. Less current-limiting than RK1; economical. Common in existing installations.
Very compact, fast. Meter stacks, feeders, semiconductor-adjacent duty. Not for high-inrush motor loads without oversizing.
Large services and feeders above 600 A. Bolt-in blade.

motorBranch.note: Maximum fuse rating as % of motor FLC. Where the calculated value does not correspond to a standard rating, the app selects the next lower standard rating; the elevated limit applies only where needed for starting.

transformer.note: Primary-only protection: 125% of rated primary current (167% if primary current < 9 A; 300% if < 2 A), next higher standard rating permitted where 125% does not correspond to a standard rating. With secondary protection at 125%: primary may rise to 300%.
